title: Flaky Italian Haddock Crumble
description: A delicious and comforting sick-day dish featuring haddock that combines a floral flavor profile with flaky texture for an indulgent yet healthy option.

ingredients.name: cocoa powder
ingredients.notes: natural, unsweetened for a healthier touch

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse haddock fillets and pat dry.
Sauté minced garlic in a bit of olive oil until fragrant, then add Italian herbs and cook for about 2 minutes.
Add haddock fillets and stir until coated with the herb mixture. Remove from heat and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine heavy cream, flax seeds, cocoa powder, and butter. Mix thoroughly until smooth.
Gently fold in cooked haddock into the cream mixture. Ensure no large chunks of fish remain for even distribution of flavors and textures.
Transfer crumble mixture onto an oven-safe baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 25 minutes or until golden brown on top and set in the middle. Check doneness by inserting a toothpick into the center; it should come out clean.
Let cool slightly before serving. Can be served warm as an appetizer or main course with a side of steamed vegetables.
